title: Stay of Execution. The original Order shall be stayed during the pendency
content: 5 of the appeal except when: 6 7 a. the penalty imposed is cancellation of license; 8 b. the penalty imposed is suspension of license for one (1) year or more; or 9 c. the penalty imposed is permanent disqualification against the principal/employer. 10 11
